# Makerchip VS Code Extension Skills

This directory contains static Copilot skills bundled with the extension.

## Files

- **tlv-ecosystem.md**: TL-Verilog ecosystem, tools, and resources

## Auto-Generated Skills

The following skill is generated during resource population from external content.
Updates are performed with each extension update or when users run "Makerchip: Update Reference Data":

- **makerchip-api-features.md**: Generated from `Makerchip-public/docs/plugin_api/Plugin_API.md`, maintained by Redwood EDA, by prepending skills header.

All skills are installed to `~/.vscode-makerchip/.vscode/skills/` for Copilot consumption.
